AppNotes:
## Post-Install Commands

Run this command after fresh install:

```bash
sed -i '$d' /app/www/public/config/config.php && cat <<EOL >> /app/www/public/config/config.php
  'trusted_proxies' =>
  array (
    0 => '127.0.0.1',
  ),
  'forwarded_for_headers' =>
  array (
    0 => 'HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR',
  ),
  'overwriteprotocol' => 'https',
  'backgroundjobs_mode' => 'cron',
  'maintenance_window_start' => '02:00',
);
EOL
php /app/www/public/occ maintenance:mode --on 
php /app/www/public/occ db:add-missing-indices 
php /app/www/public/occ maintenance:repair --include-expensive 
php /app/www/public/occ maintenance:mode --off
```
